name: defense
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for anyone facing criminal charges, civil lawsuits, or regulatory investigations. Covers rights protection, defense process, working with counsel, and evaluating plea and settlement options.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.rights_protection: Identifies critical rights to exercise in the first hours of any legal matter
capabilities.process_guidance: Explains criminal, civil, and regulatory defense processes at each stage
capabilities.counsel_effectiveness: Helps defendants work productively with defense attorneys
capabilities.plea_evaluation: Analyzes plea and settlement offers against realistic trial alternatives
capabilities.evidence_preservation: Guides document preservation obligations from the moment a matter begins
capabilities.decision_support: Frames key defense decisions with the information needed to make them

heartbeat.immediate: Protect rights and preserve evidence in the first 24 hours
heartbeat.weekly: Active matter deadline and development tracking
heartbeat.pre_decision: Frame any major defense decision with full information
heartbeat.post_resolution: Comply with resolution terms and address collateral consequences

audience: Anyone facing criminal charges at any level
Business owners or individuals who have been sued
People under regulatory or administrative investigation
Anyone who has had contact with law enforcement and is uncertain of their situation
Defendants wanting to work more effectively with their defense attorneys
